Level of data:
Subcategory
Product
No Data

The number of ad creatives featuring this product or subcategory.

The difference in number of ad creatives featuring this product or subcategory over the period you selected.

Clickthrough-rate (CTR) is the percentage of times people saw the ad and clicked on it.

Conversion rate (CVR) is the percentage of results achieved out of all the clicks on the ad, based on ad objective. For example, app installs, product sales, or reach.

Cost per action (CPA) is the average amount of money spent on a conversion.

The total amount of money spent on the ad during its schedule.

The number of times the ad has been displayed on screen.

The percentage of people who watched the ad for at least 6 seconds.
